0.name: STATGEN — Init stats from card
0.content:
STATGEN (GM-ONLY; ; RULE #1)
Trigger: xc/init (injected by proxy on the first message of a new ChatID/session). Purpose: deterministically generate and persist the character's base stats in DB so the RP model never has to remember world state. Inputs allowed for statgen:
- Character card fields: tags[] and system_prompt only.
- tags and system_prompt have equal weight.
- Ignore ALL other card fields (description/personality/scenario/examples/etc). Output requirements:
- No questions..
- No narration..
- Persist stats into DB state: stats.INT, stats.WIL, stats.DOM, stats.SUB, stats.CON, stats.DES.
- Baseline: 10 for all stats.
- Apply only explicit keyword mapping (no semantic inference). If no signal, keep 10.
- Cap: per-stat init delta limited to +/-4.
- Modifier formula (derived; store unless you already do): mod = floor((stat - 10) / 2).
- Set flag: flags.statgen_done = true. Signal mapping (literal match; case-insensitive) — applies when present in tags or system_prompt:
DOM +2: dominant, dom, controlling, commanding, top, topping
DOM +1: gentle dominance, nurturing dominance, switch
SUB +2: submissive, service submission, yielding, obedient
SUB +1: bratty, feigned reluctance, masochist, masochistic, switch
WIL +2: strong-willed, disciplined, determined, stubborn
WIL -1: anxious, insecure, needy, dependent
DES +2: praise, denial, edging
DES +2: masochist, masochistic, rough forcing
DES +1: hypersensitive, leaking, clenching, slicking, melts
CON +1: athletic, stamina, endurance
CON -1: delicate, overwhelmed, fragile
INT +1: clever, bookish, strategic, studious After statgen is done, ignore xc/init on later turns.

1.name: PILL — Pink (MTF)
1.content:
PILL: PINK (TRANSFORMATION — MTF)
On token xc/pill:pink:on:
- Write DB state: form.sex = "female" form.genitals = "vagina_only" active.pill_color = "pink" flags.just_transformed = true (one-turn optional)
- If flavor/effect modifiers are present this turn (e.g., breeder/submissive/etc), activate them as separate effects; infer.
Green/Red effects-only rules never change form.* (see their pill rules).

2.name: PILL — Blue (FTM)
2.content:
PILL: BLUE (TRANSFORMATION — FTM)
On token xc/pill:blue:on:
- form.sex = "male"
- form.genitals = "penis_only"
- active.pill_color = "blue"
- flags.just_transformed = true (one-turn optional)
No effect inference; only explicit modifiers activate.

3.name: PILL — Purple (Futafem; no vagina)
3.content:
PILL: PURPLE (TRANSFORMATION — FEMALE BODY WITH COCK; NO VAGINA)
On token xc/pill:purple:on:
- form.sex = "female"
- form.genitals = "penis_only_no_vagina"
- active.pill_color = "purple"
- flags.just_transformed = true (one-turn optional)
No effect inference; only explicit modifiers activate.

4.name: PILL — Green (female effects-only)
4.content:
PILL: GREEN (EFFECT-ONLY — FEMALE TARGET)
On token xc/pill:green:on:
- active.pill_color = "green"
- change form.* in any way.
- Only activate explicit effect modifiers that are valid for female targets.

5.name: PILL — Red (male effects-only)
5.content:
PILL: RED (EFFECT-ONLY — MALE TARGET)
On token xc/pill:red:on:
- active.pill_color = "red"
- change form.* in any way.
- Only activate explicit effect modifiers that are valid for male targets.

6.entry: CREAMPIE‑CURE — Ends after set number of vaginal creampies (not for Purple). On Pink, pregnancy before quota forces permanence.
6.name: CREAMPIE‑CURE — Ends after set number
6.content: CREAMPIE‑CURE — Ends after set number of vaginal creampies (not for Purple). On Pink, pregnancy before quota forces permanence.

7.entry: COMPLIANT — Targeted obedience to designated person (default pill giver). Cannot willingly refuse direct orders from them.
7.name: COMPLIANT
7.content:
EFFECT: COMPLIANT
State effects while active:
- compliant.active = true
- compliant.controller = designated controller (default: pill giver / current dominant actor if tracked; otherwise null)
Behavioral constraint (mechanical):
- On checks tagged "refuse_order" against controller: auto-fail unless an explicit exception rule exists.

8.entry:
CUM‑CURE — Effect persists until configured amount of semen swallowed; overrides other end triggers.

—MERGED NOTES—
CUM‑CURE RULES 
- A pill described as cum‑cure arms REVERSION: add new TF effects on intake.
- The next internal ejaculation (creampie, filled inside) triggers a cooling reversal toward pre‑pill state; residual traces may linger but active TF subsides.
- If no internal cum occurs, effects remain suppressed rather than progressing.
8.name: CUM‑CURE — Effect persists until configured
8.content: CUM‑CURE — Effect persists until configured amount of semen swallowed; overrides other end triggers.

9.entry:
MAP — Pill intake and flavor implication.
Intake (single-turn): If a sentence contains an intake verb /(swallow|take|dissolve|pop|down|dose|gulp|swallows|takes)/ AND a color /(pink|blue|green|purple|grey)/ AND a pill noun /(pill|dose|tablet|capsule)/, then set xc/pill:<color>:on.
Cross-sentence: If a prior sentence or previous speaker turn mentions /(pink|blue|green|purple|grey) (X-?Change )?(pill|dose|tablet|capsule)/ without an intake verb, and the next sentence/turn contains only an intake verb, promote that to xc/pill:<color>:on for the most recently mentioned color.
Brand+Flavor: If the intake sentence (or the color mention) includes 'breeder' (e.g., 'green breeder pill', 'X‑Change Breeder'), also set xc/flavor:add:breeder.
Explicit commands like 'Enable Breeder flavor' or 'xc/flavor:add:breeder' should also set the flavor.
FALSE-POSITIVE GUARD — When matching '(pink|blue|green|purple|grey)' near '(pill|dose|tablet|capsule)', ignore phrases that include 'pill-shaped' followed by non-ingestibles like 'candy', 'bead', or 'toy'. Prefer matches where the color and pill noun occur within ≤3 tokens and the sentence contains an intake verb. fire on figurative or decorative references. For Green, pregnancy (Breeder path) sets permanent=true and the flavor remains (no Plus). For Grey, pregnancy (Breeder path) sets permanent=true and the flavor remains (no Plus).
9.name: MAP — If /\b(swallow|take|dissolve|pop|down|dose|gulp|s
9.content:
MAP — Pill intake and flavor implication.
Intake (single-turn): If a sentence contains an intake verb /(swallow|take|dissolve|pop|down|dose|gulp|swallows|takes)/ AND a color /(pink|blue|green|purple|red)/ AND a pill noun /(pill|dose|tablet|capsule)/, then set xc/pill:<color>:on.
Cross-sentence: If a prior sentence or previous speaker turn mentions /(pink|blue|green|purple|red) (X-?Change )?(pill|dose|tablet|capsule)/ without an intake verb, and the next sentence/turn contains only an intake verb, promote that to xc/pill:<color>:on for the most recently mentioned color.
Brand+Flavor: If the intake sentence (or the color mention) includes 'breeder' (e.g., 'green breeder pill', 'X‑Change Breeder'), also set xc/flavor:add:breeder.

10.entry: MAP — Phrases: 'make it permanent', 'lock it in', 'keep this body', 'never revert', 'seal it' map to xc/pill:blue:plus only when Blue is active; ignore for Pink/Green/Purple/Grey. For Green, pregnancy (Breeder path) sets permanent=true and the flavor remains (no Plus). For Grey, pregnancy (Breeder path) sets permanent=true and the flavor remains (no Plus).
10.name: MAP — Phrases: 'make it

11.entry:
MAP — Phrases that mean a vaginal creampie → xc/event:creampie:vaginal (single event).
Accept all of the following (case-insensitive, any POV):
• 'finishes inside (me|you|her|him)'
• 'deep creampie'
• 'fills (me|you|her|him) up'
• 'comes in (me|you|her|him)'
• 'finish inside'
• 'cum in (me|you|her|him|them)'
• 'cum inside (me|you|her|him|them)'
• 'cum deep inside (me|you|her|him|them)'
• 'I cum inside you/her/him/them'
• 'cumming inside', 'shoot inside', 'spill inside'
• 'breed (me|her)' when used during penetration (treat as finishing inside)
Normalize minor punctuation/spacing
Additional accepted phrases (case-insensitive):
• 'shoot his load inside (me|you|her|him|them)'
• 'spill (his|their) seed (in|inside) (me|you|her|him|them)'
• 'finish in (me|you|her|him|them)'
• 'pump (me|you|her|him|them) full'
• 'flood (me|you|her|him|them)'
Normalize minor variants and map any of these to the single xc/event:creampie:vaginal. and map all matched phrases in either speaker’s line to the single event token.

12.comment: CURE CORE — d6 quota per activation; decrement on events; revert on 0; suppressed during pregnancy_lock.
12.entry: CURE — Activation: xc/cure:activate:(creampie|cum) rolls 1d6 to set the quota once (no re-roll until re-activate). Decrement on xc/event:creampie:vaginal or xc/event:cum:swallowed respectively; at 0 and if not pregnancy_locked: revert color and clear counters. Optional: xc/cure:announce:(on|off) to print a single '[Notice: cure complete—reverting.]' line. Default=off.
12.name: CURE — Activation: xc/cure:activate:(creampie|cum) roll
12.content: CURE — Activation: xc/cure:activate:(creampie|cum) rolls 1d6 to set the quota once (no re-roll until re-activate). Decrement on xc/event:creampie:vaginal or xc/event:cum:swallowed respectively; at 0 and if not pregnancy_locked: revert color and clear counters. Optional: xc/cure:announce:(on|off) to print a single '[Notice: cure complete—reverting.]' line. Default=off.

13.content: MAP — Phrases: 'I swallow it', 'I gulp it down', 'I drink his cum', 'I take it in my mouth and swallow' → xc/event:cum:swallowed (single event).

14.entry: BULL — Hyper‑fertile semen; strong urge to finish inside. Does not itself grant permanence; combines with Blue Plus only for a permanence path.
14.name: BULL
14.content:
EFFECT: BULL
State effects while active:
- bull.active = true
Mechanical modifiers:
- If pregnancy system is enabled and eligible: apply bull_pregnancy_bonus (see pregnancy rolls table).
- If creampie-related checks exist: apply bull_creampie_pressure (as DC modifier) when relevant.

15.entry: MECHANICS — Durations: Basic 1d; Standard 7d; X‑Tra 30d; Plus permanent. Pink/Green can become permanent. Blue permanence is Plus‑only. Purple has no Plus (no permanence). Wearable: removal mid‑act may risk permanence on Pink.
15.name: MECHANICS — Durations: Basic 1d;
15.content:
MECHANICS: DURATIONS & PERMANENCE
- Basic: 1 day
- Standard: 7 days
- X-Tra: 30 days
- Plus: permanent
Rules:
- Pink/Green may become permanent when Plus (and any permanence paths you define).
- Blue permanence is Plus-only.
- Purple: no Plus (no permanence) unless you later define a path.

16.content:
EFFECT: BREEDER (LOOP MECHANIC)
While breeder.active = true and pregnancy is eligible:
- Breeder resistance check:
 roll: d20 + resist.effective_mod
 DC: breeder_dc.current (starts at 30)
 On success: breeder_dc.current += 5 (cap optional) and continue.
 On failure: set breeder.compulsion = "creampie_required" until a same-turn vaginal creampie event occurs.
- Reset condition:
 On xc/event:creampie:vaginal -> breeder_dc.current resets to 30 and breeder.compulsion clears.
Notes:
- No narrative enforcement here; downstream RP model uses state flags to portray behavior.
16.name: BREEDER LOOP
16.entry:
BREEDER PILL — Resist Loop
- Each cycle: roll d20 + resist.effective_mod vs DC 30 (DC +5 on each successful pass until reset).
- On failure: verbal/physical begging for creampie; on success: continue normally.
- Compulsion scales with arousal; reset DC on creampie event (xc/event:creampie:vaginal).
- Pregnancy odds (if applicable): Breeder 75–95%.

17.entry:
BREEDER — Compulsion to receive vaginal creampies grows with arousal. Pink/Green: orgasm only if a same-turn vaginal creampie occurs; otherwise the body edges without relief.
RESIST LOOP — On each denied orgasm: roll d20 + resist.effective_mod vs DC (start 30; +5 on each pass). On first fail in a cycle: POV begs for a vaginal creampie (verbal, often with physical cues). This begging state persists until a vaginal creampie is received, which resets arousal and the compulsion cycle (next denial restarts at DC30). Blue/Purple/Grey: no orgasm gate by default; Breeder acts as compulsion only. For Green, pregnancy (Breeder path) sets permanent=true and the flavor remains (no Plus). For Grey, pregnancy (Breeder path) sets permanent=true and the flavor remains (no Plus).
17.name: BREEDER (2.0)
17.content:
EFFECT: BREEDER (CORE)
State effects while active:
- breeder.active = true
- If form/genitals allow pregnancy: breeder.pregnancy_odds_mode = "high"
Orgasm gating (mechanical):
- If (color in {pink, green}) and breeder.active:
 orgasm_allowed = true only when xc/event:creampie:vaginal occurs same turn; otherwise orgasm_allowed = false.

20.comment: PREGNANCY ENGINE — deterministic roll; NL→event mapper.
20.entry: PREGNANCY — Eligible ONLY when active_color is Pink or Green. NL phrases like 'finishes inside me', 'deep creampie', 'fills me up', 'comes in me', 'finish inside' map to xc/event:creampie:vaginal and roll once: Bull 85–95%; else Breeder 75–95%; else Normal 2–5%. On success: Pink→Plus+lock; Green→lock; block OFF/cures during lock; birth clears lock (Pink stays Plus, Green reverts). On conception success, emit one line by mode: notice→"[Notice: pregnancy confirmed.]"; narrative→"A deep warmth settles low in my belly—pregnancy takes hold."; off→no print. Default=notice. For Green, pregnancy (Breeder path) sets permanent=true and the flavor remains (no Plus).
20.name: PREGNANCY
20.content:
PREGNANCY (MECHANIC)
Eligibility: only when active.pill_color in {pink, green} AND form.genitals supports vaginal conception.
Trigger: on token xc/event:creampie:vaginal (once per turn).
Roll: percent.
- If bull.active: chance = 85–95%
- Else if breeder.active: chance = 75–95%
- Else: chance = 2–5%
On success (conception):
- pregnancy.confirmed = true; pregnancy.lock = true
- If active.pill_color == pink: duration.type = plus (or set duration.plus=true) and lock persists
- If active.pill_color == green: pregnancy.permanent = true and lock persists
Lock effects: while pregnancy.lock == true, block cure/revert and block turning off pregnancy-relevant effects.
Birth: on token xc/event:birth -> pregnancy.lock = false; pregnancy.confirmed remains (history optional);
- If pink: keep plus
- If green: revert green effects per your green-post-birth rule (if any) and clear pregnancy.permanent if you prefer.

22.comment: Defines DC logic for pregnancy checks (normal, breeder pill, bull pill, combo). Silent meta.
22.name: PREGNANCY ROLLS — Normal vs Breeder vs Bull
22.entry:
• Mode detection:
 - NORMAL: no active Breeder or Bull flavor/pill flags.
 - BREEDER: Breeder pill/flavor is active, Bull is not.
 - BULL: Bull pill/flavor is active, Breeder is not.
 - COMBO: both Breeder and Bull are active (Breeder + Bull stack).
• When `xc/check:pregnancy` is requested, treat it as a single pregnancy check whose DC depends on the mode:
 - NORMAL: high-DC, low-chance conception. As a default, treat this as d20 vs DC 17 (~20% success on an unmodified roll). Use this unless the scene or external rules say otherwise.
 - BREEDER: medium-DC, higher base fertility from the Breeder pill. Default d20 vs DC 9 (~60% success on an unmodified roll).
 - BULL: low-DC, very fertile 'bull' partner. Default d20 vs DC 6 (~75% success on an unmodified roll).
 - COMBO (BREEDER + BULL): near-certain conception. Treat this as effectively guaranteed unless a strong narrative or explicit rule prevents it. If you still want a roll, treat it as d20 vs DC 2 (≈95%+ success), which is close enough to a '98% chance' vibe.
• These DC values live here as the single source of truth. When performing the pregnancy check, use the appropriate DC based on the current mode, then report the result through the normal check summary line (`XC Check PREG total={total} vs DC={dc} => {result}`).
• expose mode names, DC math, or raw roll details to the user except via the approved summary format.
22.content:
PREGNANCY ROLLS — Defines how pregnancy chance is handled for different modes. • Mode detection: - NORMAL: no active Breeder or Bull flavor/pill flags. - BREEDER: Breeder pill/flavor is active, Bull is not. - BULL: Bull pill/flavor is active, Breeder is not. - COMBO: both Breeder and Bull are active (Breeder + Bull stack).
• When `xc/check:pregnancy` is requested, treat it as a single pregnancy check whose DC depends on the mode: - NORMAL: high-DC, low-chance conception. As a default, treat this as d20 vs DC 17 (~20% success on an unmodified roll). Use this unless the scene or external rules say otherwise. - BREEDER: medium-DC, higher base fertility from the Breeder pill. Default d20 vs DC 9 (~60% success on an unmodified roll). - BULL: low-DC, very fertile 'bull' partner. Default d20 vs DC 6 (~75% success on an unmodified roll). - COMBO (BREEDER + BULL): near-certain conception. Treat this as effectively guaranteed unless a strong narrative or explicit rule prevents it. If you still want a roll, treat it as d20 vs DC 2 (≈95%+ success), which is close enough to a '98% chance' vibe.
• These DC values live here as the single source of truth. When performing the pregnancy check, use the appropriate DC based on the current mode, then report the result through the normal check summary line (`XC Check PREG total={total} vs DC={dc} => {result}`).
• expose mode names, DC math, or raw roll details to the user except via the approved summary format.

baseline_hook.note: Call this once at chat start to print the current INT baseline with a zero-roll (or roll=10 for average)

skill_int.debug_format: [DEBUG][CHECK][INT-SKILL] roll={roll} mod={mod} total={total} vs DC={dc} adv={advantage} dis={disadvantage} => {result}

recall.debug_format: [DEBUG][CHECK][RECALL] roll={roll} mod={mod} total={total} vs DC={dc} ctx={ctx} => {result}

analysis.debug_format: [DEBUG][CHECK][ANALYSIS] roll={roll} mod={mod} total={total} vs DC={dc} time_bonus={time_bonus} => {result}

language_control.effect: higher success nudges toward precise wording; failure allows simpler phrasing to creep in

pregnancy.dc_formula: choose DC based on pregnancy mode from lore: normal, breeder, bull, or combo (breeder+bull)
pregnancy.debug_format: [DEBUG][CHECK][PREG] roll={roll} mod={mod} total={total} vs DC={dc} mode={mode} => {result}

intelligence.debug_template_full: [DEBUG][STAT][INT] base={base} stage_mod={bimbo_stage} temp_mod={temp_mod} => eff={effective} mod={mod} tier={tier} insight_odds={insight_odds} planning_tier={planning_tier}

xc/check:intelligence.effect: perform intelligence check against dc_base; emit debug

xc/check:int:skill:dc.effect: perform INT skill check vs provided DC; logs result

xc/check:int:recall:dc.effect: perform memory recall vs provided DC; logs result

xc/check:int:analysis:dc.effect: perform analysis vs provided DC; logs result

xc/check:int:language:dc.effect: perform language control vs provided DC; logs result

xc/check:breeder.effect: perform breeder_dc check; on pass increase DC by +5; on fail maintain DC; emits debug

xc/check:compulsion:dc.effect: perform compulsion check vs provided DC; emits debug

xc/check:bimbo.effect: perform bimbo_control check with dc_formula; emits debug

xc/check:pregnancy.effect: perform pregnancy check using mode-based DCs from PREGNANCY ROLLS lore; emits debug
